manifest.configGroups.embedding.label: Semantic search (embedding)
manifest.configGroups.embedding.descript: Pick an embedding model to enable semantic search. Configure the models themselves (base URL, API key, dimensions) in Settings → Models. Leave as “None” to use keyword search.
manifest.config.embeddingModelId.label: Embedding model
manifest.config.embeddingModelId.descrip: Choose one of the embedding models configured under Settings → Models. When set, the wiki builds a semantic index and searches it; otherwise it falls back to keyword search.
panel.rebuildIndex: Rebuild the semantic (embedding) index from all pages
reset.title: Reset wiki?
reset.body1c: — every page (daily / weekly / monthly / yearly journals, topics, entities, concepts, sources) and the ingest progress cursor.
reset.body2a: The next “record” run rebuilds from scratch.
reset.failed: _Reset failed — a wiki update may be running. Try again after it finishes._
list.empty: No wiki pages yet. They accrue as the conversation is compacted.
record.record: Record this conversation into the wiki
manifest.description: LLM Wiki — distils the rolling conversation into an Obsidian-style knowledge vault. Each compacted segment is filed automatically as a source; the agent synthesises entities / concepts / topics on top. Browse + search in the side panel.
